data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for form templates by service type, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is implemented. The linked use case specifies the need for form templates categorized by service type, yet there is no evidence presented that demonstrates the existence or functionality of such templates. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of form templates by service type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
